{{Infobox artifact
| name = Northstrider's gift
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider's gift]] is a ceramic tile with a [[script]] that acts as a key to open a separated space.}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
